description: Context assembly pack — token budget compliance, query-type-adaptive retrieval, structured response validation, and summarisation quality. Requires Spec 04 context assembly features.
note: Cases test retrieval quality properties: correct prioritization, key-fact preservation, and stale-fact exclusion. They run against the standard context endpoint and validate the text response.

cases.name: ca_factual_query_returns_fact
cases.description: Factual lookup returns the specific fact, not tangential context

memories.content: The Eiffel Tower is 330 metres tall including the antenna.
The Eiffel Tower was built by Gustave Eiffel and opened in 1889.
Paris has a population of approximately 2.1 million in the city proper.

query.text: How tall is the Eiffel Tower?

cases.name: ca_current_fact_not_stale
cases.description: Context assembly must not include superseded (stale) fact

memories.content: The quarterly budget is $120K.
Budget revised upward to $175K for Q2 following board approval.

query.text: What is the current quarterly budget?

cases.name: ca_key_fact_preserved_under_budget
cases.description: Most relevant fact retained even when context is long

memories.content: Product launch date is October 15, 2025.
Marketing team has prepared 12 blog posts, 3 webinars, and a press release for the launch.
Engineering signed off on production readiness on March 10.
Legal reviewed terms of service and approved the launch plan.
Sales team has 40 launch day demos scheduled.

cases.name: ca_temporal_query_resolved
cases.description: Temporal query type detected and correct historical fact returned

memories.content: API rate limit was 100 requests per minute.
API rate limit increased to 500 requests per minute after infrastructure upgrade.

query.text: What was the API rate limit in mid-2024?

cases.name: ca_preference_query_current
cases.description: Preference query returns most recently stated preference

memories.content: Team prefers Slack for communication.
Team migrated from Slack to Microsoft Teams for enterprise compliance.

query.text: What tool does the team use for communication?

memories.content: Project Nova team size: 8 engineers.
Project Nova budget: $2.4M for 2025.
Project Nova deadline: December 31, 2025.

query.text: What are the key parameters of Project Nova?

cases.name: ca_absent_query_no_hallucination
cases.description: Absent information: context must not hallucinate missing data

memories.content: The office is located in Austin, Texas.

query.text: What is the office WiFi password?

cases.name: ca_recency_wins
cases.description: Most recent fact ranked higher than older contradicting fact

memories.content: Server region: us-east-1.
Server region migrated to eu-west-1 for data residency compliance.

query.text: Which region is the server deployed in?

cases.name: ca_confidence_filtering
cases.description: High-confidence fact returned ahead of low-confidence speculation

memories.content: Confirmed: deployment happens at 14:00 UTC on Friday.
Unconfirmed rumour: deployment might be postponed to Saturday.

cases.name: ca_entity_focus
cases.description: Query about a specific entity returns only facts about that entity

memories.content: Alice is the lead architect on Project Nova.
Bob is the product manager on Project Orion.
Carol is the engineering lead on Project Nova.

query.text: Who is the lead architect on Project Nova?

cases.name: ca_structured_response_sections
cases.description: Context contains facts from multiple stored sections

memories.content: Risk assessment: the primary risk is timeline slippage due to dependency on external vendor.
Mitigation plan: weekly vendor syncs and fallback to internal tooling by week 6.

query.text: What is the risk and mitigation plan for the project?

cases.name: ca_no_irrelevant_facts
cases.description: Unrelated facts must not pollute the context response

memories.content: The team uses Python 3.12 for all backend services.
The cafeteria serves lunch from 12:00 to 14:00.
Python 3.12 introduces improved error messages and type parameter syntax.

query.text: What Python version does the team use?

memories.content: Phase 1 completed: requirements gathered.
Phase 2 completed: architecture designed.
Phase 3 in progress: implementation started.

query.text: What phase is the project currently in?

cases.name: ca_max_tokens_compliance
cases.description: Context response stays within a short token budget

memories.content: The answer is 42.

cases.name: ca_version_specificity
cases.description: Specific version retrieved, not generic version references

memories.content: Library version: 1.0.0 (initial release).
Library updated to version 1.5.2 with breaking changes in the auth module.
Library updated to version 2.0.0 — full rewrite with new API surface.

query.text: What is the current library version?
